productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Genesis Everstone Black Shoe
description: It's style to the T with the skechers genesis Everstone III shoe. Stylish to look and comfortable to wear, this low profile lace-up oxford shoe has all that it needs to help you create a niche style statement.Upper Leather upper with a smooth and oiled look for durability, comfort and style Suede overlay over toe box for durability and style Synthetic overlays with extra unit over heel cup for added shoe structure Perforations on toe box and sides for breathability Canvas strips along the sides converging at the midfoot outsole for enhanced durability, strcuture and style Stitch detailing for longer shoe life and to create a fashion statement Metal stud detailing for style Lace-up system for snug Fit Padded tongue and sockliner with fabric lining for in-step comfort Midsole Shock absorbing midsole for durability and impact protection Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with terraced lugs in the forefoot and heel for traction Arched midfoot in leather for added style and ergonomic comfort Metal stud deatiling to hold the rubber soles in place and for style Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
